_fixture: F5 — paused sequence, reminder is skipped
_purpose: Day-25 overdue invoice for Geeta Kalapatapu, who has replied to a prior reminder. The owner has manually set customer_tags.pause_all=true for contact_id=10. WF01 should: fetch the customer, look up tag state, hit Node 9 (IF: Paused?), and skip this iteration via the loop-back without sending anything or writing an audit row.
_preTestSetup: Before running this fixture, execute in Supabase: UPDATE customer_tags SET pause_all=true, pause_reason='Customer replied 2026-05-19, owner reviewing', paused_at=now() WHERE contact_id='10';
_expectedAction: SKIPPED via pause (no audit log row written)
